SERVICE DESCRIPTION: Custom eyelash extensions are applied to enhance the length, volume, and curl of your natural lashes. The result is fuller, more defined lashes that reduce the need for daily mascara. In the eyelash application, we include the bath and finisher to speed up the glue drying process.
Custom eyelash extensions are applied to increase the length, volume, and curl of your natural lashes. In this technique, 5-7 lashes are attached to each of your natural lashes.
Procedure done every 15 to 20 days.
A lash lift curls your natural lashes from the root, creating a longer and more lifted appearance. The tint adds rich color, giving the look of darker, fuller lashes without mascara.
Brow lamination smooths and sets the eyebrow hairs in place for a fuller, more defined look. This treatment helps shape and style your brows while creating a sleek, polished finish.
Gentle hair removal from the upper lip area leaves the skin smooth and clean. The treatment helps enhance the overall appearance of your facial features.
Removes unwanted hair from the lower lip area quickly and effectively. The result is soft, smooth skin and a more polished look.
This service removes stray hairs and cleans up the brow area while maintaining your natural shape. It creates a neat and well-groomed appearance.
A customized eyebrow shaping service designed to complement your facial features. The brows are carefully mapped and shaped to create a balanced and flattering look.
Chemical removal of eyelash extension
Focuses on restoring moisture to dry scalp and hair. Typically includes a steam infusion, hydrating mask, and a 7-step scalp cleanse.
Deep cleansing to remove product buildup, hard water minerals, and pollutants. Often utilizes exfoliating scrubs or charcoal-based masks
Targeted therapy using high-frequency tools, micro-needling, or ""hair ampoules"" to stimulate follicles and increase scalp circulation.
Uses pH-balanced, hypoallergenic products like Argan oil or honey ginger. Designed to soothe redness, itching, and inflammation.
A relaxation-heavy service featuring extended scalp, neck, and shoulder massage, often paired with aromatherapy and ""waterfall halo"" hydrotherapy.
A condensed skincare boost including a double cleanse, light exfoliation, and a custom mask performed while the scalp treatment sets.
An extra 15–20 minutes focusing on hands, feet, or an intensified neck/shoulder release to complement the head service.
Professional drying and styling. Note: Most basic head spas only include a ""rough dry""; a full blowout is typically a premium add-on.
Adds 15–30 minutes of manual or tool-assisted massage to a standard session for deeper tension relief.

Effortless. Natural. Life-Proof
Stop struggling with brow pencils and wake up to professional symmetry every morning. Using advanced nano-needle technology, we create ultra-fine hair strokes that mimic your natural brow for a soft, polished look that lasts 2–3 years.
-The Look: Fluffy, ""brushed-up,"" and natural—no harsh lines.
- The Feel: Minimal trauma and suitable for all skin types.
- The Life: Smudge-proof and sweat-proof, from the gym to the pool.
- The Fit: 100% bespoke mapping and color-matching to your unique features.
Experience the freedom of permanent beauty.

Perfect for those who prefer a more defined makeup appearance, this procedure offers a bolder, filled-in, ""penciled"" look
. Unlike hair strokes, this shading technique deposits a soft color across the brow to provide a solid shape
. It is highly effective for clients with sparse natural hair or for covering up older, faded permanent makeup

A specialized shading technique specifically designed for clients who have had permanent brow makeup done previously
. If your old brow tattoo has faded or changed color over time, this procedure uses corrective shading to cover up and neutralize the older work, restoring a beautiful and natural brow colo

Microblading uses a fine blade to create ultra-fine hair strokes that seamlessly blend with your natural brow hair
. It provides the same incredibly natural appearance as Nano Brows but tends to fade more quickly, typically lasting 6 months to a year
. This is an excellent option for clients seeking beautiful, natural results without the long-term commitment of permanent makeup

A specialized, shorter microblading session designed explicitly for clients who only have minor gaps or sparse areas in their natural brows
. This service simply adds natural-looking hair strokes to fill in those specific gaps
. It is a semi-permanent option lasting about 6 months and is not intended for full brow reconstructions

Effortless Color, Every Single Day:
Elevate your natural beauty with Lip Blush, a premium semi-permanent treatment designed to define, brighten, and enhance your lips
Instead of a heavy “lipstick” look, this technique deposits a soft, sheer tint that mimics the flush of youth, looks like a natural gloss, and adds the illusion of fullness for about one year
/ Definition & Symmetry: Gently redefine your lip borders for a more balanced appearance
/ Customized for You: We begin with a personalized consultation to blend a bespoke shade that complements your skin tone
/ Life-proof Results: Enjoy a smudge-proof, “woke up like this” glow that eliminates the need for daily reapplying

For a more dramatic, glamorous finish
Lip Tint offers a vibrant, lipstick-like look. This service adds deep color and sharply defines the lip line to give your lips a bold, fully made-up appearance. The results are highly durable, lasting three years or even longer

A highly natural enhancement where pigment is implanted directly into the lash line. Instead of looking like obvious makeup, it creates a subtle, dark line that blends seamlessly with your natural lashes, making them appear thicker and fuller
The beautiful, effortless result lasts between 3 to 4 years

A bold, permanent makeup procedure that gives your eyes striking definition. This service involves drawing a fully defined eyeliner look along the eyelid, complete with a beautiful wing, allowing you to wake up with perfect eye makeup every single day

Beyond the physical journey of surgery comes the emotional step of feeling like yourself again. Our Areola Micropigmentation service is a specialized paramedical tattoo technique designed to restore the natural appearance of the breast. By meticulously layering custom pigments, we recreate the color, shape, and 3D-effect of the areola with hyper-realistic detail. Whether you are finishing a reconstructive journey or addressing natural discoloration, our goal is to provide a finish that brings back your confidence and a sense of completion

Scar Camouflage: Restore Your Skin’s Natural Harmony
Don’t let a scar tell your story. Our advanced Scar Camouflage treatment uses specialized paramedical tattooing to blend scars into your natural skin tone. By custom-matching pigments to your unique complexion, we break up the appearance of scar tissue, making it significantly less visible and helping you feel comfortable in your own skin again.
The Benefits:
Seamless Blending: We use ""skin-tone"" pigments to neutralize discoloration and redness.
Texture Improvement: The process can help soften and smooth the appearance of the treated area.
Long-Lasting Confidence: A smudge-proof, permanent solution that lets you move freely without the need for heavy concealers.

An in-person consultation dedicated to discussing your specialized paramedical aesthetic goals. We will analyze your skin and discuss a customized treatment plan specifically for areola restoration, scar camouflage, or micropigmentation to ensure safe, beautiful, and restorative results

Reveal Your Most Radiant Skin

Using an advanced stem cell serum we create controlled micro-channels in the skin, triggering your body’s organic healing response—boosting collagen and elastin production from the inside out

The Ultimate Natural Glow-Up: Treat yourself to a complete, fresh-faced transformation with our exclusive 2.5-hour ""Beauty Day"" package. Designed specifically for clients seeking a very soft, effortless enhancement that highlights natural youth and beauty, this all-in-one appointment is the perfect self-care routine
The package includes three revitalizing treatments:
- Radiant Skin: We begin with face micro-needling to stimulate cellular renewal and leave you with a beautiful, lit-from-within glow
- Subtle Brow Enhancement: Next, we use gentle microblading to add delicate, natural-looking hair strokes, perfectly filling in any gaps or sparse areas in your brows without looking heavy
- Soft Lip Blush: Finally, we apply a sheer lip blush to give your lips a healthy, revitalized flush of natural color
Maintain Your Look: Because both the brow microblading and lip blush are designed to provide a highly natural, semi-permanent finish, the results will gracefully fade over about six months. . To help you keep your flawless, everyday glow year-round, this service combination is available as a convenient and cost-effective repeatable package or membership
